_note: LEGACY OBSERVE-ONLY RE CAPTURE - mapped the death/status flag offset for docs/modding/07 Test 2a. No HP rewrite: vanilla kills units normally and the mod logs [DEATH-DUMP], [DEATH-DIFF], and [DEATH-FOLLOW]. This proved +0x61 bit 0x20 is set on real death; Tests 2b/2c later proved writing that bit does not cause real KO. Keep for historical auditing only.
